global.description: The ad features a modern design with abstract shapes and clear text elements.
global.main_message: Promoting a new season of FluxStream with a free trial offer.

elements.label: Ad background
elements.description: Full canvas background of the mobile advertisement.

elements.label: abstract shapes
elements.description: A combination of circular and rectangular shapes in a light blue background, creating a modern and abstract look.

elements.label: FluxStream logo
elements.description: The logo features the text 'FluxStream' in bold, clear typography, positioned prominently at the top of the ad.

elements.label: additional shapes
elements.description: Additional abstract shapes that complement the main design, maintaining a cohesive visual theme.

elements.label: season announcement
elements.description: Text that reads 'A new season drops' in a large, bold font, centered in the middle of the ad.

elements.label: cancellation notice
elements.description: Smaller text below the main message stating 'Cancel anytime', providing additional information.

elements.label: call to action
elements.description: A prominent button at the bottom of the ad with the text 'Try for free', designed to attract user interaction.
elements.text_content: A new season drops Cancel anytime

elements.label: main title
elements.description: The headline 'FluxStream' is displayed in a bold, eye-catching font at the top of the ad.

elements.label: free trial offer
elements.description: A call to action button at the bottom of the ad inviting users to 'Try for free', designed to be visually appealing.

embedding_texts.global_text: unknown, unknown, interstitial, minimalistic with bold colors, FluxStream logo, call to action.
embedding_texts.layout_text: The logo is at the top, followed by the headline, body text in the center, and the CTA at the bottom.
embedding_texts.ocr_text: A new season drops, Cancel anytime, FluxStream, Try for free
